comment: Judgment-call seeds for admin-area ingestion (A7, owner directive). Each row maps a country/level to the Wikidata class QID whose instances are that country's admin areas, and the places.kind they should be stored as. Loaded through shared/utils/bootstrapGuard (10MB hard cap) into ncdb's admin_class_map table; ingestion reads verified rows only. Evidence fields record how each QID was validated — keep them honest.

classes.label: council area of Scotland
classes.evidence: 35 P31 instances probed 2026-07-18 (32 current + historical; QID dedupe handles)

classes.label: administrative territorial entity of Northern Ireland
classes.evidence: 12 P31 instances probed 2026-07-18 via Antrim and Newtownabbey's own P31. subclassWalk=0: this is an UMBRELLA class — its P279* walk over-matched 60 rows (historical counties etc.); direct P31 only.

classes.label: Landkreis (rural district of Germany)
classes.evidence: P279* walk yields 639 in DE (history included); the currentOnly filter (FILTER NOT EXISTS P576 dissolution) yields 295 — the real current Landkreis count. Auto-discovery missed this umbrella (it ranked leaf per-Land classes); reviewed + seeded 2026-07-19. Covers Landkreise only, not kreisfreie Städte (Q22865, separate future class).

classes.label: province of Spain
classes.evidence: Clean leaf class: direct P31 = P279* walk = 51 in ES with the currentOnly filter (FILTER NOT EXISTS P576), probed 2026-07-19 — the 50 provinces + edge. No subclass over-match (unlike DE Q22865). Provinces are ADM2; the upsert dedups by wikidata QID, so any already stored as region get adm2_code tagged and the rest are created as county.

classes.label: province of Italy
classes.evidence: direct P31 = 83 current provinces in IT (currentOnly, probed 2026-07-19); sampled labels all real (Cuneo, Pisa, Perugia, Vercelli). subclassWalk=0 so metropolitan cities (separate class) and abolished provinces are excluded. Post-2015-reform current set.

classes.label: administrative arrondissement of Belgium
classes.evidence: direct P31 = 43 in BE (currentOnly, probed 2026-07-19) — exact match to the 43 administrative arrondissements; sampled labels all real (Antwerp, Leuven, Hasselt, Tongeren). Pure admin subdivisions (not cities). subclassWalk=0.

classes.label: district of Austria
classes.evidence: direct P31 = 102 current in AT (currentOnly, probed 2026-07-19); sampled labels all real (Horn/Lienz/Rohrbach/Schärding/Gmunden District + Statutarstädte St. Pölten/Krems/Wels/Wiener Neustadt). QID found off-SPARQL (wikidata.org/wiki/Q871419) since the P279* discovery walk 502s. = ~79 Bezirke + ~23 statutory cities (dual-nature: existing city rows get adm2_code tagged, kind preserved). subclassWalk=0 (direct, over-match-proof).
